ab: tucu a qadav kacuin amen ni sinsi a sema tua zaziljavan tua qemuziquzip, kipacumali amen a veneli tua kipu i paljing.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: ta tedep amen i puqemuziquzipan, qivu ti sinsi, “aicu a i qayav mareka qayaqayam, azua i vililj mareka qatjuvi, ziljavu a masantalj.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: marekutj aken ta qatjuvi, manasika inika navaik a pacun tua mareka qatjuvi.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: pacun aken tua liav a qayaqayam, minlayalayap i vavav tua kasiv, izua za ljequ i taladje tua kasiv a nataqed uta.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: izua za zu, unma katua likuljav i puqemuziquzipan, inika napavala pacun tuca mareka qemuziquzip, maleva aken angata tua ku pinacunan tucu a qadav.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: napasasing aken a pakaliav, sa ku sipapacun tjai kama kati kina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: sa’a nu tjaivililj tjara kinakiciyur tjai kama kati kina a sema maza.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
